queryList.1: hp_master: select city_id, city, time_zone, is_fix_point, sort_distance_wight, city_name_en, is_open_faraway, activity_status, inlet_tips, share_picture, travel_mode,is_use_index_module,age_limit,city_shop_sort,city_shop_evaluation_config,is_use_index_module_en, take_meal_after_out,driver_operation_distance_limit_type,open_languge_page,map_resource, polling_on_off,excise_calculate_type,is_del,city_code,delivery_map_resource,order_tax_type, tab_voucher,deliverable_action from city_config where city = '九江市' and is_del = 0 limit 1
queryList.2: hp_master: /*FORCE_MASTER*/ select tcu.id, tcu.plan_id, tcu.task_id, tcu.complete_orders, tcu.end_time, tcu.task_status, tcu.complete_time, tcu.create_time, tcu.user_id, tcu.sub_task_id, tci.task_sn, tcu.city, tcu.receive_type, tci.type,tci.task_name,tci.img_url,tci.task_type,tcu.snapshot_id, tci.day_num, tci.order_type, tci.order_min_price, tci.award_type, tci.order_num from hp_task_center_user tcu,hp_task_center_info tci where tcu.task_id = tci.id and tcu.is_del = 0 and tcu.sub_task_id = 0 and tcu.task_status = 0 and tcu.user_id = 1398716814
queryList.3: hp_master: select c.city,tc.activity_id,tc.task_num from hp_task_city_config tc , city_config c where tc.city_config_id = c.city_id and tc.is_del = 0 and c.is_del = 0 and c.city = '九江市'

queryList.7: hp_master: SELECT id,user_id,plan_id,tag_id,snapshot_id,task_id,task_status,is_del,create_time,update_time,complete_time,complete_orders,end_time,city,sub_task_id,task_type,benefit_type,sort,parent_id,receive_type FROM hp_task_center_user WHERE (user_id = 1398716814 AND is_del = 0 AND task_status = 0 AND sub_task_id = 0) limit 1
queryList.8: hp_master: select tcp.id planId, tcp.plan_name ,tcp.plan_status ,tcp.valid_time_type ,tcp.activity_id ,tcp.task_num ,cl.start_time ,cl.end_time from hp_task_center_plan tcp ,hp_city_link cl where tcp.id = cl.business_id and cl.business_type = 1 and tcp.is_del = 0 and tcp.plan_status in (1,2) and cl.`is_del` =0 and (cl.city ='全部城市' or cl.city = '九江市')
queryList.9: hp_master: SELECT t.sensors_type, t.id , t.tag_name, tl.user_tag_id, tl.user_tag_name FROM hp_task_center_user_tag t LEFT JOIN hp_task_center_user_tag_link tl on t.id = tl.business_id and tl.business_type = 1 WHERE t.is_del =0 and t.tag_status = 1 and t.business_type = 1 and t.business_id in ( 126 )

queryList.11: hp_master: select tci.id ,tci.plan_id ,tci.tag_id ,tci.task_name ,tci.task_sn ,tci.task_status ,tci.`type` ,tci.day_num ,tci.order_num ,tci.participate_type ,tci.participate_num ,tci.order_type ,tci.order_min_price ,tci.award_type ,tci.task_type ,tci.img_url ,tcd.task_id ,tcd.sub_task_id ,tcd.benefit_type ,tcd.award_type as sub_award_type ,tcd.out_id ,tcd.send_number ,tcd.config_type ,tcd.city ,tcd.member_city_id from hp_task_center_info tci ,hp_task_center_award_config_detail tcd where tci.is_del = 0 and tcd.task_id = tci.id and tci.task_status = 1 and (tcd.city = '城市公用红包' or tcd.city = '九江市') and tci.task_type = 2 and tci.tag_id in ( 1272 )
